description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a modern, rectangular design and clean lines. The facade features a combination of white and gray surfaces, accented by vertical wooden panels and multiple balconies with metal railings. The building has four main stories above ground level, with a flat roof that includes rooftop structures and access points. Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior units. The ground floor includes entrances and possibly parking or communal areas, while the upper floors are dedicated to residential units. The overall appearance is contemporary, with a focus on functionality and urban living.
description: A modern, four-story apartment building with white and gray facades, wooden accents, and multiple balconies. Features a flat roof and regularly spaced windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing three stacked balconies, main entrance area, and a clean, symmetrical facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the building, multiple balconies, and vertical wooden accent panels.
description_view_2: Rear view with no balconies, a flat roof, and a regular grid of windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, wooden accents, and the building's overall length.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across all floors, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
